Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Grow up big n' strong, my precious, luxurious veggies![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}But man, all this nonstop waterin' and weed-pullin', not to mention the bugs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 21 3 101}It's pretty monotonous. Kinda just feels like busywork.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You can be a weird dude sometimes, y'know? But honestly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The whole idea of raisin' somethin' one step at a time... It feels kinda familiar.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 21 3 7}Oh, yeah! It's just like levelin' up in a game. Hey, maybe this doesn't suck so bad after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}What, are you some kinda monk now? Tryin' to reach enlightenment or somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 21 3 7}Well, if we get to train and raise veggies, it's like killin' two birds with one stone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Maybe we should try catchin' flies with chopsticks like one of those master swordsmen, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Like a what!? The hell does that even mean?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}We gotta treat it with love and kindness. Sound about right, o wise one?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Gotta say, we've got a long way to go before these veggies put us on Easy Street.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Anyway, I'm the one who asked you to join me in the first place, so I gotta be the one to look after 'em.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the rooftop planters with Junpei...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Ta-dah da-daaah! The veggies have leveled up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The extra care is paying off,[n]and I can harvest more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Whew, another day of hard, honest work. Let's head back downstairs.[n]{f 1 1}
